meta_description: Stay 5 minutes from Baku Airport. Free pickup, family apartments, studio and villa options. Book now via Airbnb or Booking.
page_title: Apartments Near Baku Airport – Book Direct | Free Transfer
payment_section_intro: Pay securely for your stay and services. If you need an invoice or a specific currency, ask us on WhatsApp before you arrive.
payment_card_fee_note: Card payments may include a small processing fee—ask on WhatsApp before you pay. Cash and bank transfer options available.
hero_title: Apartments near Baku Airport (GYD) – 5 minutes, free transfer, 24/7 check-in
hero_subtitle: Private apartments for short stays and layovers at Heydar Aliyev International Airport: 24/7 airport transfer, fast WhatsApp and Telegram support, and five bookable listings minutes from the terminal.

urgency_line1: Limited availability for tonight · High demand near the airport
urgency_line2: Book early to secure the best price
direct_book_title: Direct booking = Better price than Booking.com
about_p1: Long layovers and crack-of-dawn departures are easier when you are close to the airport. Our apartments offer a calm place to sleep, work, and refresh—without a long drive into the city center.
about_p2: Visiting Baku for a few days? You can still explore the city and return to a comfortable base near GYD when your schedule is tight.
about_li1: Ideal for late arrivals and early departures
about_li2: Apartment-style space—not a noisy hotel corridor
fact_best_for_val: Transit, business stopovers, short leisure trips
why_section_sub_1: Stay just 5 minutes from Baku Airport (GYD) in a calm, private apartment—rest, work, and refresh without a long drive downtown. Ideal for late arrivals, early flights, and short Baku visits.
why_section_sub_2: Perfect for transit, business stopovers, and families who want space—not a noisy hotel corridor.
why_more_services_hint: Breakfast, tours, late check-in & more — see additional services.
why_meta_best_text: Transit travelers, business stopovers, short leisure trips
why_cta_whatsapp: Book Now via WhatsApp – Fast Response 24/7
amenities_intro: Highlights drawn from what we publish on Airbnb and Booking.com for all three airport apartments. The exact setup can differ by unit—confirm anything important when you reserve.
amenity_wifi_text: Wireless internet suitable for messages, video calls, and light remote work.
amenity_entire_text: Private apartment space—not just a hotel room—with living and sleeping areas in most listings.
amenity_kitchen_text: Fridge, cooking basics, microwave, dishes, and coffee- or tea-making in line with our platform listings.
amenity_laundry_text: In-unit laundry on the listings—handy for longer stays and quick refreshes between flights.
amenity_climate_text: Climate control and hot water so you stay comfortable any time of year.
amenity_tv_text: Television in the apartments for downtime after travel (features vary by unit).
amenity_parking_text: On-site or nearby parking included on our published listings—ask for the exact spot when you book.
amenity_patio_text: Outdoor space such as a patio or balcony on select apartments—see photos on Airbnb or Booking.com.
amenity_bedlinen_text: Fresh bed linens, essentials, and clothing storage as described on each listing.
amenity_iron_text: Bathroom and clothing care basics so you can pack lighter.
amenity_safety_text: Smoke alarms and carbon monoxide detectors where our platforms require them.
amenity_hosting_text: We are used to early flights, late arrivals, and last-minute changes—message us on WhatsApp or via your booking channel.

tours_section_title: Private Baku City Tour – 4 to 5 Hours
tours_section_intro: Discover Baku’s top sights from a comfortable private car with an experienced driver. Ideal for first visits, layovers, and short stays. Prices follow your language: AZN on AZ, USD on EN / TR / AR.
tours_feat_private_car: Private car — Sedan, Mercedes Vito, or BMW X5
tour_route_desc: See the capital’s signature sights at a comfortable pace—perfect after a flight or before departure from Heydar Aliyev Airport (GYD). Your driver-host adapts photo stops and pacing to your group.
tour_route_stop_1: Icherisheher (Old City) — UNESCO-listed lanes, cafés, and craft shops inside ancient walls
tour_route_stop_2: Nizami Street — lively pedestrian avenue for shopping, sweets, and people-watching
tour_route_stop_3: Baku Boulevard — long Caspian promenade (about 24 km total); we focus on the central scenic stretch
tour_route_stop_4: Mini Venice — picturesque canals and bridges near the waterfront
tour_route_stop_5: Deniz Mall — contemporary shopping, dining, and sea views
tour_route_stop_6: Funicular — short scenic ascent with outlooks over the city and bay
tour_route_stop_7: Highland Park — elevated viewpoint for panoramic photos of Baku and the Flame Towers
tour_route_stop_8: Maiden Tower — landmark tower at the heart of the Old City (exterior visit; entry optional)
tour_route_stop_9: Palace of the Shirvanshahs — medieval royal complex within the Old City (exterior or entry on request)
tour_route_stop_10: Historic Azerbaijani bathhouses — traditional hammam architecture in the Old City quarter
tour_route_note: Order and duration at each stop may vary slightly with traffic and your interests. Tell us your hotel or flight times when you book.
tour_route_price_teaser: Private tour — pricing depends on vehicle size and season. Ask on WhatsApp or Telegram for a clear quote and pickup details.
wa_tour_book_route: Hello! I’d like to book the private Baku highlights city tour (about 4–5 hours, route: Old City, Nizami Street, Boulevard, Mini Venice, Deniz Mall, Funicular, Highland Park, Maiden Tower, Shirvanshahs’ Palace area, historic baths). Please confirm availability, vehicle type, and hotel or GYD pickup. My preferred date:

faq_section_intro: Quick answers about stays near Heydar Aliyev International Airport (GYD). Message us on WhatsApp for anything specific.
faq_q1: How far are the apartments from Baku Airport (GYD)?
faq_a1: About 5 minutes by car to Heydar Aliyev International Airport under normal traffic. We can arrange airport transfer in Baku—send your flight number and arrival time on WhatsApp.
faq_q2: Do you host short stays or transit guests?
faq_a2: Yes. Our Baku airport accommodation works well for layovers, early departures, and short visits. Tell us your check-in and check-out window on WhatsApp so we can match the right unit.
faq_a3: We offer 24/7 transfer when booked in advance. Share landing time, terminal, and party size—we will confirm the details and price before you arrive.
faq_a4: We communicate in English, Azerbaijani, Turkish, and Arabic for bookings and guest support—WhatsApp is usually fastest.
faq_q5: How can I pay for my stay?
faq_a5: We accept cards, cash, and several currencies. See the full list on our payment methods page and ask on WhatsApp about any card processing fee before paying.
